ars is in Leo in a nativity, the native will be impatient, be valorous, intent upon grabbing others
money and children, will like to live in forests, be fond of eating cows flesh (or beef etc.), will
lose his first wife, will kill snakes and animals, will be bereft of children, be devoid of
charitable acts and be always active in his jobs.
11-12. MARS IN VIRGO.
Should Mars occupy Virgo at birth, the subject will be worthy of honour, be never rich, be very
fond of sexual union and music, be soft and sweet spoken, will have various kinds of
expenses, be not much valorous, be learned, will have ribs in their advanced position, will
fear enemies very much, be skillful in Shastras and fine arts, be fond of bathing, make-up etc.
and be splendourous.
13-14. If Mars occupies Libra
in a nativity, the person will be liable to wandering, will indulge in bad business, be an able
speaker, be fortunate, deformed in respect of some limb, will have few relatives, be fond of
